summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Intervention form refactoring. All features working correctly: 3 cascading filter columns (Catégorie → Modèle → Spécification), optional Chirurgien/Salle d'opération fields, stock results table with Description/N° de série/Stock, +/- quantity controls, and edit modal with pencil button. Fixed one bug: edit modal had required attribute on surgeon/room fields.
passed_tests: Create intervention modal opens with 3 cascading filter columns (Catégorie, Modèle, Spécification)
Chirurgien and Salle d'opération are optional in create form (no required attribute)
Date et heure is required in create form
Cascading filters work: selecting Category filters Models and Specifications
Stock results table shows Description, N° de série, and Stock columns
+ button adds product to selected products list
+/- buttons in selected products modify quantity
Intervention created successfully without surgeon/room via POST /api/interventions
Edit button (pencil icon) in detail panel opens edit modal
Edit modal allows partial updates (surgeon only, room only)
GET /api/instances/available-stock returns results and filter_options for cascading filters
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/admin/Interventions.js - Removed 'required' attribute from surgeon and operating_room fields in edit modal, added 'Facultatif' placeholder
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing stock data for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Intervention form refactoring is complete. Create modal has: 4-column top row (Date*/Chirurgien/Salle/Patient), 3 cascading filter columns for stock browsing, results table with Description/Serial Numbers/Stock/Add button, and selected products with +/- quantity controls. Edit modal opens from detail panel via pencil icon. Backend models have Optional[str] for operating_room and surgeon. The /api/instances/available-stock endpoint returns {results, filter_options} for cascading filters.

edit_intervention_modal.trigger: data-testid='edit-intervention-btn' - pencil icon in detail panel

backend_endpoints.POST /api/interventions: Creates intervention with optional surgeon/room, accepts products array

bug_fixed.description: Edit modal had 'required' attribute on Salle d'opération and Chirurgien fields, preventing saving with empty values
bug_fixed.fix: Removed 'required' attribute and added 'placeholder="Facultatif"' to match create form behavior
